zh.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh.Hazlewood near Skipton, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Vavasour III於大約1380年出生在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特時，他的父親William Vavasour II47歲，母親Elizabeth Stapleton46歲。他於1399年6月之前與Margaret Skipwith II在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年3月27日在英國英格蘭越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特享年34歲，埋葬在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特。

zh-hans.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh-hans.Hazlewood near Skipton, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 亞爾 斯吉普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Vavasour III于大约1380年出生在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特时，他的父亲William Vavasour II47岁，母亲Elizabeth Stapleton46岁。他于1399年6月之前与Margaret Skipwith II在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年3月27日在英国英格兰越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特享年34岁，埋葬在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Vavasour III was born about 1380, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Vavasour II, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth Stapleton, was 46. He married Margaret Skipwith II before June 1399, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 March 1413, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Vavasour III est né environ 1380, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Vavasour II, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stapleton, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Skipwith II avant juin 1399, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mars 1413, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Vavasour III um 1380 in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Vavasour II 47 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stapleton 46. Er hat vor Juni 1399 in England Margaret Skipwith II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. März 1413 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Vavasour III è nato il circa 1380 nel Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Vavasour II, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stapleton, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Skipwith II prima del giugno 1399, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1413, nel Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Hazlewood near Skipton, Yorkshire, Engla: イギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ネアル スキプトン
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Vavasour IIIが約1380年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで生まれた時，父William Vavasour IIは47歳，母Elizabeth Stapletonは46歳であった。1399年6月以前にイギリスでMargaret Skipwith IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年3月27日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで34歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Vavasour III(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Vavasour II(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stapleton(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1399년 6월 이전 영국에서 Margaret Skipwith II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 3월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Vavasour III nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Vavasour II, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stapleton, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Skipwith II antes junho de 1399, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de março de 1413, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Vavasour III родился около 1380 г. в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Vavasour II было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stapleton, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Skipwith II перед июнь 1399 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 марта 1413 г. в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Vavasour III nació aproximadamente 1380, en Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Vavasour II, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stapleton, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Margaret Skipwith II antes de junio de 1399, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1413, en Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
